attributes.description: Cross-artifact insider-threat investigation dashboard. Each panel groups findings by INVESTIGATIVE CONCEPT (execution, file access, exfil, auth, persistence) rather than by source artifact. Pulls from shellbags-*, prefetch-*, registry-*, browser-*, filesystem-*, lnkfiles-*, evtxlogs-* through one combined data view. The _index column on each panel tells you which artifact a given row came from so you can drill back into the per-artifact dashboards for full detail.
attributes.panelsJSON: [{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":14,"i":"it-p1","w":48,"x":0,"y":0},"panelIndex":"it-p1","panelRefName":"panel_it-p1","title":"UNIFIED TIMELINE — every artifact, every event, by @timestamp (use _index column to identify source)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"it-p2","w":24,"x":0,"y":14},"panelIndex":"it-p2","panelRefName":"panel_it-p2","title":"Execution Evidence — Prefetch + Registry (BAM/AppCompat/Amcache/UserAssist) + EVTX (Sysmon 1, Security 4688)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"it-p3","w":24,"x":24,"y":14},"panelIndex":"it-p3","panelRefName":"panel_it-p3","title":"File Access & Movement — Shellbags + LNK files + MFT (non-directory)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"it-p4","w":24,"x":0,"y":26},"panelIndex":"it-p4","panelRefName":"panel_it-p4","title":"Exfil & Data-Out — browser downloads/exfil sites + USB & mapped drives + cloud-storage configs","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"it-p5","w":24,"x":24,"y":26},"panelIndex":"it-p5","panelRefName":"panel_it-p5","title":"Authentication & Session — EVTX logon family (4624/4625/4634/4647/4648/4672/4778/4779 + account changes)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"it-p6","w":48,"x":0,"y":38},"panelIndex":"it-p6","panelRefName":"panel_it-p6","title":"Persistence & Autoruns — registry Run keys/services/scheduled tasks + EVTX service installs","type":"search"}]
attributes.title: Insider Threat Overview
